params.name: q
params.description: Lucene-like search query. Every card field is searchable, including nested fields (set.id:sm1, legalities.standard:banned), wildcards (name:char*), exact match (!name:charizard), and ranges (hp:[150 TO *]).

params.name: page
params.description: The page of data to access.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum cards to return (default and max 250).

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Field(s) to order results by; prefix with - for descending.

params.name: select
params.description: Comma delimited list of fields to return (e.g. id,name,rarity).

items.docs: Search for one or many cards given a Lucene-like search query. Returns paginated card objects with attacks, abilities, legalities, images, and TCGplayer/Cardmarket prices.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the card (set ID plus card number, e.g. xy1-1).

items.docs: Fetch the details of a single card by its ID.

params.name: q
params.description: Same Lucene-like query syntax as card search.

items.docs: Search for one or many sets. Returns set objects with card counts, series, release dates, legalities, PTCGO codes, and symbol/logo images.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the set (e.g. base1, swsh1).

items.docs: Fetch the details of a single set by its ID.
Returns all energy types (Colorless, Darkness, Dragon, Fairy, Fighting, Fire, Grass, Lightning, Metal, Psychic, Water).
Returns all card subtypes (Basic, Stage 1, Stage 2, EX, GX, V, VMAX, VSTAR, MEGA, TAG TEAM, Item, Supporter, Stadium, and more).
Returns all card supertypes (Energy, Pokémon, Trainer).
Returns all card rarities (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Rare Holo, Ultra Rare, Illustration Rare, Special Illustration Rare, and more).
